overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist exploring a tropical beach and overgrown jungle ruins. The character walks along the shoreline with crashing waves before venturing into dense vegetation covering ancient modern structures.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach toward the overgrown ruins in the distance

entered.detail: turquoise ocean with white crashing waves along the shoreline
golden sand stretching along the water's edge
large modern structure overtaken by tropical vegetation and trees
tall palm trees marking the jungle boundary
broken wooden boat or debris scattered on the sand

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit tropical beach with crashing ocean waves on the left. The character walks forward on golden sand toward distant ruins of a modern building overtaken by vegetation. Palm trees line the right side marking the jungle boundary, and wooden debris lies scattered in the foreground.

events.description: character moves from open beach into dense jungle vegetation
lighting shifts to dappled shade as character enters palm tree canopy

agents.ego_description: transitioning from the open beach into the shaded jungle interior, moving toward the ruins

entered.detail: dense overhead canopy of palm fronds creating shade
thick ferns and jungle plants covering the ground
crumbling concrete walls of the modern structure now visible up close

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the open beach and enters the jungle edge where the ruins become prominent on the left. The lighting shifts to dappled shade under the palm canopy overhead. Dense tropical undergrowth surrounds the path as the character moves deeper into the vegetation-covered ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense jungle path through ancient ruins

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the towering palm tree canopy above
camera returns to forward facing position to navigate the jungle path

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrow jungle path, looking up at the towering palm canopy before continuing forward

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through dense vegetation
decaying logs and debris scattered along the path edges
overgrown stone and concrete structures flanking the path

segments.scene_description: Deep in the jungle, the character follows a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense vegetation and ruins. The camera tilts up to admire the towering palm canopy blocking most of the sky, then returns to forward view as the character continues navigating the enclosed trail. Overgrown walls and structures flank both sides of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open tropical beach into the claustrophobic depths of a vegetation-choked ruin. It begins on golden sand with crashing ocean waves to the left, moving forward past scattered wooden debris and palm trees toward distant architectural remains. As the character leaves the shoreline, the scene shifts into dappled shade under a palm canopy, where the open beach gives way to dense tropical undergrowth and more prominent ruins. The camera then follows a narrow dirt path deeper into the jungle, tilting upward to reveal a towering canopy that blocks the sky before returning to the trail. Finally, the environment closes in completely as the character navigates an enclosed path flanked by overgrown walls and ancient structures.
